name: papermill
description: 研序 Agentic Research - local-first autonomous research agent desktop application

scripts.test: node scripts/run-python.mjs -m pytest && node scripts/run-python.mjs -m ruff check backend tests scripts/build_desktop_sidecar.py && node scripts/check-i18n.mjs && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.desktop:before-dev: npm run desktop:sidecar && npm run frontend:dev
scripts.desktop:prepare: npm run frontend:build && npm run desktop:sidecar
